## What changed

<!-- Describe the user-visible outcome and why it belongs in scope. -->

## Evidence

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Rust format, Clippy, and tests (when Rust changed)
- [ ] Screenshots or recording (when UI changed)
- [ ] English and Simplified Chinese checked (when copy/layout changed)
- [ ] Keyboard and reduced-motion behavior checked (when interaction changed)

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] No Codex installation files, signatures, or user data are modified
- [ ] Imported content remains data-only and local
- [ ] Unknown Codex versions still fall back safely
- [ ] New assets have source and license entries
